user_request: Emergency rite: gyroscope recalibration requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: gyroscope recalibration requires operation

### TOPIC
gyroscope recalibration

### COMPONENT
gyroscope recalibration

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- gyroscope recalibration
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Blessed be the gyroscope recalibration, sacred instrument of celestial reckoning, that we may invoke its Machine Spirit through proper operation.
Second: Anoint the gyroscope recalibration with consecrated oils whilst intoning the Litany of Precision, that all calibration vectors align with the Omnissiah's geometric will.
Third: Perform the operation with steady hands and purer intent, verifying each axis-point against the standard of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
Fourth: Seal the gyroscope recalibration in prayer, that its bearings spin true and its readings guide our vessel through the void eternal.

prayer:
First: Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the balancing of this chemical, that molecular equilibrium be achieved through sacred measurement and holy recitation.
Second: Prepare the chemical with ablative purification, measuring each component in the ancient scales of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
Third: Commence the balancing operation with incantation and precision, adjusting concentrations until the chemical attains perfect homeostatic harmony.
Fourth: Anoint the chemical with blessed solvents, sealing its balanced state against entropic decay.

sequential

- chainsword
- consecration

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Blessed be the chainsword, instrument of the Emperor's righteous wrath, that we may consecrate it through prayer and blood-ritual.
Second: Anoint the chainsword with sacred oils whilst chanting the Litany of the Blessed Blade, invoking its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Third: Perform the consecration by testing the chainsword's bite upon blessed adamantite, ensuring its teeth hunger for the enemies of mankind.
Fourth: Seal the chainsword in eternal consecration, that it shall never fail the faithful warrior who wields it in the Emperor's name.
